blocks.description: Header comments, OPTIONS for macro tracing and page layout, and LIBNAME statements for raw time series data (read-only), staging workspace, and target output library.

DATA step with RETAIN for cumulative revenue, LAG1-LAG5 functions to compute 3-month and 6-month moving averages, month-over-month percent change calculation, and trend direction indicator assignment.
DATA step for time series interpolation: carry-forward imputation for missing revenue values using LAG1, and date continuity gap detection using INTNX month increment comparison.
PROC SQL to perform year-over-year comparison by self-joining sales data on region and 12-month offset via INTNX, computing YoY percent change for revenue and moving averages.

DATA step for fiscal period computation using INTNX/INTCK date arithmetic: fiscal year (July start), fiscal quarter, calendar days in month, daily average revenue, normalized 30-day revenue, and months elapsed since baseline.
PROC MEANS with CLASS statement for seasonal aggregation of revenue metrics by fiscal year and quarter, producing tgt.seasonal_summary with mean, sum, std, and count statistics.
